segments.text: Yeah, Sonic's already at KO percent, so Mild's gonna start throwing out finishing moves!
segments.original_text: 当然ねあのソニックはもう撃墜パーセントなんで撃墜できる技をマイルド側も振っていきます

segments.text: Same thing with that Brawler Mii from before, right?
segments.original_text: さっきのねあの格闘Miiとかもそうだ

full_text: Yeah, Sonic's already at KO percent, so Mild's gonna start throwing out finishing moves! Same thing with that Brawler Mii from before, right?
